title: Bomb squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Bomb squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth. A cordon was put in place after the package was found during a routine security search at the Moray base.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bomb squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth
